title: Modular Query Editor
prompt:
Create a production-ready Modular Query Editor using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build an accessible compact query composer with three fixed filter modules—Owner, Status, and Priority—above a semantic text input. Clicking a module toggles a small cobalt token into the query summary; the summary should state exactly how many filters are active. Use a light Bento surface: #F4F5F6 surround, white panel, #ECECEE borders, 22px rounded corners, soft shadow, #111111 primary type, and #4A4A4F help text. Cobalt is the sole bright accent; no gradients on the card.

Use real checkbox controls or buttons with aria-pressed, a visible label for the text field, and an aria-live polite result. Each control has a 44px target; keyboard Enter and Space must perform the same selection as a pointer. Hover may raise modules 2px in 180ms and press may compress them 1px in 90ms. Insert and remove a token with a spring of stiffness 360 and damping 29, while the result text fades over 160ms. Keep the input usable even when no module is selected.

At 320px, stack the modules cleanly above the input; in a wide preview they may sit in one row. Keep logical focus order, a 3px dark focus ring, and AA contrast. Avoid remote content, timers, local storage, random values, dynamic code, and network calls. Prefer opacity and transform. With prefers-reduced-motion, use an immediate token state or a 120ms opacity change. Return complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML: <form class="uiwiki-query-editor"><button aria-pressed="false">Owner</button><input aria-label="Search query"></form> */
.uiwiki-query-editor{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 10px 28px #1111}.uiwiki-query-editor button,.uiwiki-query-editor input{min-height:44px;margin:4px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;color:#111;font:700 14px system-ui}.uiwiki-query-editor button[aria-pressed="true"]{border-color:#2563eb;background:#eff6ff}.uiwiki-query-editor button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-query-editor :focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-query-editor *{transition:none!important}}

demoCode:
(() => { function Demo(){const [p,setP]=React.useState([]);const f=['Owner','Status','Priority'];const t=x=>setP(v=>v.includes(x)?v.filter(y=>y!==x):[...v,x]);return

{p.map(x=>{x})}{p.length||'No'} active filters
